title: Instant Structures
description: Create farms with ease! Instant Structures let's you create prebuilt farms and other things.
body:
Never build farms again! Instant Structures lets you build farms instantly. Very WIP at the moment. Structures include: - Iron Farm
![Iron Farm Crafting Recipe](https://file.garden/Y8lUh1O_hHHIeRqH/Screenshot%20at%202023-06-14%2011-08-27.png) - Simple Super Smelter
![Simple Smelter Crafting Recipe](https://file.garden/Y8lUh1O_hHHIeRqH/Screenshot%20at%202023-06-14%2011-12-38.png)
Proud partner of [SparkedHost](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2731)! ![SparkedHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91821ec704a0404b4ce0803df459159a20589d63.jpeg)
